Retractor Lite Table Top Hardware Specifications & Features

Professional Trade Show Display Hardware

Our Retractor Lite Table Top Hardware provides the perfect foundation for your professional banner displays at trade shows, events, and presentations. This lightweight aluminum system offers exceptional portability without sacrificing stability.

Key Features:

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for easy transport
  • Available in black or silver finish options
  • Dual swivel feet provide enhanced stability on any surface
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and breakdown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for professional display
  • Compact 24.62" W x 39" H x 11" D dimensions
  • Ultra-portable 5lb weight for easy transportation

Professional Display Applications:

Perfect for trade shows, conferences, retail displays, presentations, and tabletop marketing where space is limited but professional appearance is essential.

Note: Banner sold separately to allow complete customization of your display message.

Banner Stand Hardware Materials & Construction

Premium Aluminum Construction

Our table top hardware features lightweight yet durable aluminum construction that provides years of reliable service while remaining easy to transport between events.

Finish Options:

  • Black Finish: Professional matte black coating that resists scratches and maintains appearance through heavy use
  • Silver Finish: Classic aluminum finish that complements any banner design or brand colors

Hardware Components:

  • Aluminum base with integrated snap rail system
  • Shock cord telescoping pole for easy assembly
  • Dual swivel feet with non-slip contact points
  • Banner tape and snap rail attachment system

Durability Features:

Designed for frequent setup and breakdown, this hardware withstands the demands of trade show circuits and regular event use while maintaining professional appearance.

Table Top Banner Hardware Setup & Assembly Options

Quick Assembly System

The shock cord pole design allows for rapid setup without tools or complicated instructions. Simply extend the pole, secure the banner, and adjust the swivel feet for optimal stability.

Banner Attachment Methods:

  • Top Mounting: Snap rail system provides secure attachment and easy banner changes
  • Bottom Mounting: Banner tape creates smooth, professional bottom edge without wrinkles

Stability Features:

  • Dual swivel feet adjust to uneven surfaces
  • Low center of gravity prevents tipping
  • 11" depth provides stable footprint
  • Non-slip foot pads protect surfaces

Portability Options:

At only 5lbs total weight, this hardware easily fits in trade show cases and can be transported as carry-on luggage for most airlines.

Compatible Banner Specifications:

Designed to work with banners up to 39" height and 24.62" width for optimal display proportion and stability.

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Banner Stand Hardware

We provide flexible production time ranges to meet your event deadlines. Choose from our expedited or standard production options based on your timeline needs.

2 Business Days Express

Need your table top hardware quickly for an upcoming event? Our express production gets your order completed and shipped within 2 business days.

  • Ideal for last-minute trade show preparations
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service
  • Turnaround begins when order is complete and confirmed

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production timeline offers the perfect balance of speed and value for most event planning schedules.

  • Free standard production time
  • Suitable for most trade show and event timelines
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Production time excludes shipping duration

5 Business Days Saver

Planning ahead? Choose our saver option to reduce costs while still receiving quality hardware well before your event.

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Perfect for events planned weeks or months ahead
  • Same quality standards as expedited options
  • Production begins upon order confirmation

Important Notes:

  • Production time begins when file upload and approval are complete
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration
  • Proof requests may extend timeline pending approval

Banner Specifications for Table Top Hardware Compatibility

Banner Dimension Requirements

To ensure proper fit and professional appearance with your table top hardware, banners must meet specific size requirements.

Required Banner Specifications:

  • Maximum Width: 24.62 inches
  • Maximum Height: 39 inches
  • Recommended Material: 13oz vinyl banner material
  • Top Finish: Snap rail compatible edge
  • Bottom Finish: Clean edge for banner tape attachment

Design Considerations:

  • Keep important text and graphics within safe margins
  • Allow for 1-2 inches at top and bottom for hardware attachment
  • Design for tabletop viewing distance (3-8 feet typical)
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum visibility

File Format Requirements:

  • High-resolution PDF (300 DPI minimum)
  • Full-size artwork at actual print dimensions
  • All fonts converted to outlines or embedded
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction

Banner Material Options:

While hardware accommodates various banner materials, we recommend 13oz vinyl for durability and professional appearance at trade shows and events.

Attachment Compatibility:

Banners must be finished with snap rail compatibility at the top and smooth edge at bottom for proper hardware attachment and professional display.

Frequently Asked Questions About Table Top Banner Hardware

What banner sizes work with this table top hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners up to 24.62" wide by 39" tall. This size provides optimal stability and professional appearance for tabletop displays.

How much does the complete hardware system weigh?

The entire system weighs only 5 pounds, making it easy to transport to trade shows and events. It fits easily in most trade show cases and can often be carried on airlines.

What's the difference between black and silver finish options?

Both finishes offer the same durability and functionality. Black provides a modern, professional look that works with most banner designs, while silver offers a classic aluminum appearance. Choose based on your aesthetic preferences.

Is the banner included with the hardware?

No, banners are sold separately to allow complete customization of your message and design. This also allows you to order multiple banners for the same hardware system for different events.

How difficult is setup and breakdown?

Setup takes less than 2 minutes with no tools required. The shock cord pole system extends easily, and the swivel feet adjust quickly to any surface. Breakdown is equally fast for efficient event transitions.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

While the hardware is durable, it's designed primarily for indoor use at trade shows and events. The lightweight design prioritizes portability over wind resistance for outdoor applications.

What production time should I choose for my event?

For events planned more than two weeks ahead, our 5-day saver option provides the best value. For events within two weeks, choose 3-day standard. For urgent needs within one week, select 2-day express production.

Do you offer volume discounts for multiple hardware units?

Yes, volume discounts are available for larger quantities. Contact our customer service team for pricing on orders of 10 or more units.
